Assembly: The assembly ilChlClor1.hap1.1 is based on 69x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Chromosomes Z and W were identified by copy number in the diploid assembly.

Assembly: The assembly daLobUren4.hap2.2 is based on 168x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. This genome has been assembled using PacBio and HiC data and phased. The result is two curated haplotypes. A haplotypic inversion and translocation was observed in the region on chromosome 3 ( 51.7-53.9 Mbp). A large number of centromeric repeats is in the unlocalised sequences. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 5 (30.0 - 31.1 Mbp ) are unknown. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 7 (25.2 - 26.1 Mbp) are unknown.
